seoTitle: HubSpot Tutorial for Beginners: Getting Started Guide
metaDescription: Learn HubSpot from scratch, covering contacts, sales pipelines, forms, email, and Breeze AI tools to manage your whole revenue engine in one place.
intro: HubSpot combines your contacts, sales pipeline, and marketing tools into one connected system, which can feel like a lot when you're just starting out. This beginner's tutorial breaks down the essential building blocks, from importing contacts to setting up your first sales pipeline and trying out its AI features.

steps.heading: Set up your contacts and import data
steps.body: Head to the Contacts section and import your existing customer data via CSV, mapping fields carefully to avoid duplicate records.

steps.heading: Understand lifecycle stages
steps.body: Review the default stages, from Subscriber through to Customer, so you know how HubSpot classifies contacts as they move through your funnel.

steps.heading: Build a sales pipeline
steps.body: Open Sales Hub and set up a visual deal pipeline, then drag deals through custom stages as they progress.

steps.heading: Create lead capture forms
steps.body: Use the native Forms builder to create a form for your website, then grab the embed code to publish it and start collecting leads.

steps.heading: Connect your inbox and calendar
steps.body: Link your email and calendar so HubSpot can automate meeting bookings and keep your communication log up to date.

steps.heading: Try Breeze AI tools
steps.body: Use the Breeze AI assistant and @mention tags inside conversations to enrich contact records and automate small workflow tasks.

faq.question: Is HubSpot only for sales teams?
faq.answer: No, HubSpot connects marketing, sales, and customer service functions around a shared set of contact records, so it's useful across departments.

faq.question: What are lifecycle stages in HubSpot?
faq.answer: Lifecycle stages track where a contact sits in your relationship with them, from a first-time Subscriber all the way to a closed Customer.

faq.question: What is Breeze AI?
faq.answer: Breeze AI is HubSpot's built-in assistant that can summarize threads, enrich lead data, and update records using simple @mention commands.

faq.question: Can I connect other tools to HubSpot?
faq.answer: Yes, the HubSpot App Marketplace lets you connect a wide range of third-party software to extend what HubSpot can do.
